query:
SELECT 
  aiPass,
  afterStatus,
  reasonCode,
  COUNT(*) as cnt
FROM ai_auto_review_logs
WHERE batchId = 'pass2_1772665430420_shwsna'
GROUP BY aiPass, afterStatus, reasonCode
ORDER BY cnt DESC;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ViCMbGRGvoSuVwV.root --database GgA9WvTBCZMf6mjyMMwACw --execute 
SELECT 
  aiPass,
  afterStatus,
  reasonCode,
  COUNT(*) as cnt
FROM ai_auto_review_logs
WHERE batchId = 'pass2_1772665430420_shwsna'
GROUP BY aiPass, afterStatus, reasonCode
ORDER BY cnt DESC;
